name: llm.jimchen.me
description: - A separate file to call the LLM, minimal and fast interface - User can set a default model, no default system instructions. User provides the API, enter sends the message, stream the message, no pictures for now, parse the output with `vscode/markdown-it-katex` - User can copy, edit, branch, and delete any previous message by user or bot, and "retry" for every previous bot message based on messages before that (use a doubly linked list) - All messages are saved on server Redis and PSQL, one user with one password authentication, message continues if user closes the browser tab, timeout 120s
